description: State machine definition for the /zero-to-one workflow

states.name: Enable terse mode
states.instruction: Run /caveman full to enable terse output mode for the session.
states.exit_condition: Caveman terse mode confirmed active.

states.name: Open session
states.instruction: Run /sessions to open or resume the current work session and record session metadata.
states.exit_condition: Session note created or resumed in vault.

states.name: Load prior context
states.instruction: Call mem_context and mem_search to retrieve relevant prior decisions, patterns, and learnings from Engram memory.
states.exit_condition: Prior context loaded and summarized; relevant memories identified.

states.name: Parallel research batch
states.instruction: Fork into parallel research branches: vault search, Engram search, web research, and GitHub skeleton search.
states.exit_condition: All four parallel research branches complete.

states.name: Vault search
states.instruction: Run /vault-find to search the Obsidian Brain vault for prior notes, decisions, and related project content.
states.exit_condition: Vault search results returned and summarized.

states.name: Engram search
states.instruction: Call mem_search to find relevant episodic memories, past bugs, architecture decisions, and learnings stored in Engram.
states.exit_condition: Engram search results returned and relevant observations identified.

states.name: Web research
states.instruction: Use exa-web-search MCP to research the problem domain, find prior art, best practices, and relevant documentation.
states.exit_condition: Web research complete; key findings summarized.

states.name: GitHub skeleton search
states.instruction: Run gh search repos to find battle-tested skeleton projects and open-source implementations that solve 80%+ of the problem.
states.exit_condition: Candidate skeleton repos identified and ranked by relevance.

states.name: Context7 docs
states.instruction: Fetch live documentation for the chosen stack via Context7 MCP to ensure up-to-date API and framework knowledge.
states.exit_condition: Live docs fetched and relevant sections cached for planning phase.

states.name: Enter plan mode
states.instruction: Call EnterPlanMode to switch Claude Code into plan-only mode where no writes are executed.
states.exit_condition: Plan mode active; all subsequent steps are planning only until ExitPlanMode.

states.name: Multi-plan
states.instruction: Run /multi-plan to generate competing implementation plans from multiple model perspectives and synthesize the best approach.
states.exit_condition: Multi-plan output complete; competing plans synthesized into a ranked recommendation.

states.name: Parallel planning
states.instruction: Fork into parallel planning agents: planner for implementation plan and architect for system design.
states.exit_condition: Both planner and architect agents complete their outputs.

states.name: Planner agent
states.instruction: Invoke Agent(planner) to produce a detailed implementation plan covering phases, tasks, dependencies, and risks.
states.exit_condition: Planner agent output complete with task list, phases, and risk register.

states.name: Architect agent
states.instruction: Invoke Agent(architect) to produce system design including component boundaries, data flow, API contracts, and persistence model.
states.exit_condition: Architect agent output complete with system design doc and architecture diagram.

states.name: Codex adversarial review
states.instruction: Run /codex:adversarial-review to get a GPT-5.4 second opinion on the plan, challenging assumptions and surfacing blind spots.
states.exit_condition: Adversarial review complete; findings and challenges documented.

states.name: User confirmation gate
states.instruction: Call AskUserQuestion with labeled options to present the synthesized plan and get explicit user approval or amendment before proceeding.
states.exit_condition: User has confirmed, amended, or rejected the plan with a clear decision.

states.name: Exit plan mode
states.instruction: Call ExitPlanMode to leave plan-only mode and allow write operations to proceed.
states.exit_condition: Plan mode exited; write operations re-enabled.

states.name: Save plan milestone
states.instruction: Call mem_save to persist the approved plan, architecture decisions, and tech stack choices to Engram memory.
states.exit_condition: Plan milestone saved to Engram with topic key and structured content.

states.name: Setup package manager
states.instruction: Run /setup-pm to configure the appropriate package manager (npm/pnpm/yarn/bun/pip/cargo) based on the confirmed tech stack.
states.exit_condition: Package manager configured and lockfile initialized.

states.name: Initialize repo
states.instruction: Run gh repo create or gh repo fork to create or fork the repository on GitHub, then clone and configure git remotes.
states.exit_condition: Repository created on GitHub, cloned locally, and git remotes configured.

states.name: Load coding standards
states.instruction: Auto-load write-time skills and coding standards for the chosen language and framework to enforce style, immutability, and structure during implementation.
states.exit_condition: Coding standards and write-time skills loaded and active.

states.name: Bootstrap docs
states.instruction: Invoke Agent(doc-updater) to generate initial project documentation including README, architecture overview, and contributing guide.
states.exit_condition: Bootstrap documentation written and committed.

states.name: TDD start
states.instruction: Run /tdd to enter the test-driven development workflow: write failing tests (RED) before any implementation code.
states.exit_condition: First failing test written and confirmed RED.

states.name: Stack testing skill
states.instruction: Load the framework-specific testing skill for the chosen stack (e.g., pytest, vitest, go test, cargo test) to apply idiomatic test patterns.
states.exit_condition: Framework-specific testing skill loaded and test runner verified.

states.name: Property-based tests
states.instruction: Write property-based tests for data transformations, validation logic, serialization, and invariants using hypothesis/fast-check/proptest/gopter as appropriate.
states.exit_condition: Property-based tests written and passing; invariants verified across generated input space.

states.name: Implement GREEN
states.instruction: Write the minimal implementation code required to make all failing tests pass. Follow immutability patterns, small files (<150 LOC), and structured reasoning before implementation.
states.exit_condition: All tests passing GREEN; coverage at or above 80%.

states.name: Save first GREEN milestone
states.instruction: Call mem_save to persist the first GREEN milestone including what was implemented, key decisions made, and any bugs encountered.
states.exit_condition: GREEN milestone saved to Engram memory.

states.name: Refactor clean
states.instruction: Run /refactor-clean to remove dead code, extract large modules, eliminate duplication, and enforce file size limits.
states.exit_condition: Dead code removed, files under 150 LOC, no duplication flagged.

states.name: Lint + verify
states.instruction: Run /verify quick to execute linter, type checker, and test suite to confirm clean baseline before review phase.
states.exit_condition: Lint, types, and tests all pass with zero errors.

states.name: Orchestrate feature
states.instruction: Run /orchestrate feature to sequence the multi-agent review pipeline across security, language, and database reviewers.
states.exit_condition: Orchestration pipeline initiated and first reviewer agent started.

states.name: AgentDiet context brief
states.instruction: Classify all prior phase outputs as KEEP, SUMMARIZE, or DROP per AgentDiet rules. Compress trajectory before passing to review agents to reduce input tokens 40-60%.
states.exit_condition: Context brief computed; trajectory compressed and ready to pass to reviewer chain.

states.name: Security review
states.instruction: Invoke Agent(security-reviewer) to audit for hardcoded secrets, injection vulnerabilities, missing auth/validation, CSRF, XSS, and architectural security issues.
states.exit_condition: Security review complete; all findings classified by severity; CONFIDENCE tag emitted.

states.name: Language review
states.instruction: Run a language-specific reviewer agent to audit idiomatic usage, anti-patterns, performance pitfalls, and style conformance for the chosen language.
states.exit_condition: Language review complete; idiomatic issues and anti-patterns documented; CONFIDENCE tag emitted.

states.name: Database review
states.instruction: Invoke Agent(database-reviewer) to audit schema design, query efficiency, migration safety, index coverage, and N+1 patterns.
states.exit_condition: Database review complete; schema and query findings documented; CONFIDENCE tag emitted.

states.name: Compile findings
states.instruction: Deduplicate and merge findings across A26, A27, and A28. Classify by severity (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW). Apply escalation triggers if any CRITICAL issues found.
states.exit_condition: Unified findings list produced with deduplication complete and severity rankings assigned.

states.name: Codex pre-commit review
states.instruction: Run /codex:adversarial-review for a final GPT-5.4 pre-commit pass. Present findings to user and ask which to apply before committing.
states.exit_condition: User has selected which Codex findings to apply; selected fixes implemented.

states.name: Pre-PR verify
states.instruction: Run /verify pre-pr to execute the full verification suite: build, types, lint, and all tests. Must pass clean before PR creation.
states.exit_condition: All pre-PR checks pass with zero errors and zero warnings.

states.name: Mutation testing
states.instruction: Run mutation testing on changed files only using Stryker/mutmut/cargo-mutants/go-mutesting. Target 60%+ mutation score. Strengthen weak tests before proceeding.
states.exit_condition: Mutation score on changed files is 60% or above; weak tests strengthened.

states.name: Commit
states.instruction: Run /caveman-commit to show diff to user, stage files, and create a conventional commit with a descriptive message following the git-workflow format.
states.exit_condition: Commit created with passing pre-commit hooks and conventional commit message.

states.name: Create PR
states.instruction: Run gh pr create to open a pull request with a comprehensive summary, test plan, and any skipped step notes in the PR body.
states.exit_condition: PR created on GitHub; PR URL returned to user.

states.name: Checkpoint
states.instruction: Run /checkpoint to snapshot the current session state including completed steps, open decisions, and any deferred work.
states.exit_condition: Checkpoint snapshot saved and resumable.

states.name: Save architecture
states.instruction: Call mem_save to persist the final architecture decisions, patterns used, and key learnings with structured What/Why/Where/Learned format.
states.exit_condition: Architecture and learnings saved to Engram with appropriate topic key.

states.name: Vault session
states.instruction: Run /vault-session to write or update the session note in the Obsidian Brain vault with session summary, links to relevant notes, and project reference.
states.exit_condition: Vault session note written with YAML frontmatter and session content.

states.name: Learn eval
states.instruction: Run /learn-eval to evaluate what patterns, decisions, and learnings from this session are worth encoding as new or updated skills.
states.exit_condition: Learn eval complete; skill candidates identified and density scores computed.

states.name: Evolve skills
states.instruction: Run /evolve --generate to propose new skill definitions for high-density patterns identified in learn-eval. Present to user for approval before saving.
states.exit_condition: User has approved or rejected proposed skill evolution; approved skills saved.

states.name: Session summary
states.instruction: Call mem_session_summary to write the end-of-session summary to Engram, capturing what was built, decisions made, and what to revisit next session.
states.exit_condition: Session summary saved to Engram. Workflow complete.
